positive: A dramatic, wide landscape view of a cozy Parisian café terrace on a rainy afternoon, viewed from a slightly elevated perspective, steam rising from coffee cups, reflections on wet cobblestones, soft diffused natural light, detailed watercolor and ink sketch style, reminiscent of Edward Hopper and Monet, vibrant yet muted color palette, high contrast, cinematic, 8k, ultra quality, landscape aspect ratio
